title: Manage Notifications for Individuals and Teams Separately
excerpt: I utilize the Owner Column twice. First for the individual assigned to the task/item. Second for the Team the individual represents. This is needed to show leadership how many teams in our department are impacted by work…

posts.author: ceberle (Chrissy Eberle)
posts.cookedHtml: I utilize the Owner Column twice. First for the individual assigned to the task/item. Second for the Team the individual represents. This is needed to show leadership how many teams in our department are impacted by work requests in addition to the individuals who will complete the tasks. I would like to limit notifications to the individuals and not the entire team associated with the task. So, controling notifications for individuals and teams within a board separately would be helpful.

posts.author: ashley.george (Ashley)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have the same issue.
Task Person / 1st Review Person / 2nd Review Person
The Review People ALWAYS think it’s their time to review when they are only being assigned to the task.
A solution to MUTE the “assigned” notification for each column would be a great feature.

posts.author: sirah (Sirah E)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @ashley.george I would recommend to put a status column next to the person and set an automation that will change the status to “In Review” once assigned and the person will just come in and change the status accordingly.

Here is the Monday Knowledge base for the people column: https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360002281539-The-People-Column

hope this helps!

Sirah - Mindflows
